description_long: This is a compact submachine gun with a matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a prominent vertical foregrip for enhanced control during rapid fire. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, while the pistol grip and foregrip are made of textured polymer for improved handling. The weapon is equipped with iron sights, including a front ring sight and a rear diopter sight, both integrated into the upper receiver. A detachable curved box magazine is inserted into the magwell, characteristic of submachine guns designed for close-quarters combat. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible pins, selector switch, and ejection port details. The stock is absent, making the weapon highly maneuverable and suitable for urban environments where compactness is essential.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a short barrel, vertical foregrip, iron sights, and a detachable curved magazine. The design is robust, with metal and polymer components and no visible stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular front sight, barrel end, and vertical foregrip directly below the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved magazine, pistol grip, selector switch, and the absence of a stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear diopter sight, top of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and additional receiver details.
